category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a general-purpose library for reading WordPerfect files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides libwpd and source_facts.homepage is the official libwpd site.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official libwpd project site; the SourceForge project wiki is the official wiki documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage identifies the official SourceForge project, whose code browser is the official source-control surface.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies reading WordPerfect files; source_facts.executables lists wpd2html, wpd2raw, and wpd2text.
